title: notifications core — permissions
description: Two guards. Sanctum-guard permissions are user-facing (inbox, preferences, tenant admin template management). Platform-admin-guard permissions gate cross-tenant search + delivery retry. Every permission is seeded by `NotificationsPermissionSeeder` with is_system=true.

permissions.name: notifications.viewAny
permissions.description: List own inbox (`GET /api/v1/tenant/notifications`). Every authenticated user has this by default — seeded on the base user role.

permissions.name: notifications.view
permissions.description: Read a single Notification (`GET /api/v1/tenant/notifications/{id}`). Same default as viewAny.

permissions.name: notifications.markSeen
permissions.description: Mark notification(s) as seen. Default for every authenticated user.

permissions.name: notifications.archive
permissions.description: Archive a notification from own inbox. Default for every authenticated user.

permissions.name: notifications.delete
permissions.description: Hard-delete a notification. NOT normally granted — users archive, retention purges. Reserved for support tooling.

permissions.name: notifications.preferences.view
permissions.description: View own notification preferences.

permissions.name: notifications.preferences.update
permissions.description: Update own notification preferences.

permissions.name: notifications.preferences.adminView
permissions.description: View ANY user's preferences within tenant — for support + DPO Art. 30 records-of-processing.

permissions.name: notifications.templates.viewAny
permissions.description: List templates — platform defaults + tenant overrides. Admin surface.

permissions.name: notifications.templates.view
permissions.description: View a single template + its rendered body.

permissions.name: notifications.templates.create
permissions.description: Create a new tenant-override template.

permissions.name: notifications.templates.update
permissions.description: Update a draft template.

permissions.name: notifications.templates.delete
permissions.description: Delete a template. Refused for is_system=true rows and rows with live sends.

permissions.name: notifications.templates.publish
permissions.description: Publish a draft template — SOC 2 CC8.1 change management gate.

permissions.name: notifications.templates.test
permissions.description: Send a test render to a real recipient. Rate-limited.

permissions.name: notifications.admin.view
permissions.description: Access the tenant admin sends dashboard + subscribe to tenant.{id}.notifications broadcast channel.

permissions.name: platform.notifications.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant search of Notification rows for support / abuse investigation.

permissions.name: platform.notifications.view
permissions.description: View a single Notification cross-tenant. Includes anonymous-addressee notifications.

permissions.name: platform.notifications.retry
permissions.description: Retry a failed delivery. Rate-limited to prevent replay abuse.

permissions.name: platform.notifications.templates.viewAny
permissions.description: List every template across tenants for platform ops.

permissions.name: platform.notifications.categories.viewAny
permissions.description: List the category registry across tenants.
